extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL object representation rather than a concrete file path or URL
metadata.reasoning_chain: Using the results of (a) but replacing $\varepsilon=5\,\mathrm{V}$ by $\varepsilon=-10\,\mathrm{V}$, we have $$\begin{aligned} I_{R_{1}}&=\frac{\varepsilon_{2}}{R_{1}}=1\,\mathrm{mA},\ \text{rightward} ;\quad I_{R_{2}}=0,\\ I_{L}&=1\,\mathrm{mA},\ \text{upward} ;\quad I_{\varepsilon_{2}}=1\,\mathrm{mA},\ \text{downward}. \end{aligned}$$
